name: Sangram (Annual Sports Festival)
description: The national-level annual sports festival of IIT Roorkee hosting universities across the country.

name: Thomso (Annual Cultural Festival)
description: The grand cultural festival of IIT Roorkee, recognized as one of the largest in Northern India.

name: Cognizance (Annual Technical Festival)
description: The technical festival of IIT Roorkee featuring guest lectures, hackathons, and exhibitions.

name: SDSLabs (Software Development Section)
description: Student-run technical group developing web apps, games, and hosting campus workshops.

name: IMG (Information Management Group)
description: The student group managing Channel i and maintaining IIT Roorkee's intranet portal.

name: MDG (Mobile Development Group)
description: Tech group focusing on mobile application development and modern app architectures.

name: PAG (Programming and Algorithms Group)
description: The competitive programming community under SDSLabs guiding students in DSA and coding contests.

name: InfoSecIITR (Information Security Group)
description: Ethical hacking and cybersecurity enthusiast group hosting Capture the Flag (CTF) challenges.
